title: Planet Postie
short_description: Deliver space mail by knowing your planets — send Mercury's parcel to Neptune and it arrives frozen solid with a passive-aggressive note.
description: You're the solar system's only postal worker, and the mail is PILING UP. Deliver each parcel by knowing your planets: which one is third from the Sun? Which is the red one, the ringed one, the giant one? Deliver Mercury's mail to Neptune and it arrives frozen solid with a passive-aggressive note attached. Grade bands ramp from famous planet facts, to the full Sun-to-Neptune order, to neighbour puzzles and the solar system's weirdest trivia. A free online solar system and space science game for kids in grades 2–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the right planet before the rocket-mail timer runs out.
